examples: The firm began as a lockmaker in 1897.
Waertsilae Oyj, which helped form Assa Abloy in 1994, sold its entire stake in the lockmaker for 135 million euros, booking a 117 million-euro profit, the company said.
Hellstrom last month announced he would retire and will be replaced by Carl-Henric Svanberg , the head of lockmaker Assa Abloy , effective April 8.
